suspicious_activity.narrative: Cindy Clayton, DOB 1961-08-31, residing at 08330 Robert Stravenue, Garciaberg, AL, engaged in suspicious structuring activities from 2025-02-05 to 2025-08-02. Multiple ATM withdrawals and cash deposits were made just below $10,000, including $7,491.44 and $5,774.15 withdrawals on 2025-07-31, and a $6,933.66 deposit on 2025-08-02. These transactions were conducted across various branches, including Eastside Center and Northgate Mall. The pattern suggests deliberate structuring to avoid CTR reporting, inconsistent with her profile as an applications developer with an annual income of $163,820. This activity triggers SAR filing under BSA regulations.
